boundary: This Batch 03 notes dry-run is a blank reviewer-input scaffold only. It does not create real review evidence, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, or make the product production-ready.
